description:
___
###[choco://flicflac](choco://flicflac)
To use choco:// protocol URLs, install [(unofficial) choco:// Protocol support ](https://chocolatey.org/packages/choco-protocol-support)
___

![Screenshot of FlicFlac](https://cdn.staticaly.com/gh/bcurran3/ChocolateyPackages/master/flicflac/flicflac_screenshot.png)

FlicFlac is a portable (no installation required) utility for converting WAV, FLAC, MP3, OGG and APE files to any of the other formats.

You may drag files onto the FlicFlac interface, or convert files directly from the right click menu in Windows Explorer.

Supported Conversions
WAV to FLAC · WAV to MP3 · WAV to OGG · WAV to APE
FLAC to WAV · FLAC to MP3 · FLAC to OGG · FLAC to APE
MP3 to FLAC · MP3 to WAV · MP3 to MP3 (bitrate change) · MP3 to OGG · MP3 to APE
OGG to FLAC · OGG to WAV · OGG to MP3 · OGG to APE
APE to FLAC · APE to WAV · APE to MP3 · APE to OGG
    
**[PACKAGE NOTES](https://github.com/bcurran3/ChocolateyPackages/blob/master/flicflac/readme.md)**


___

Click here to [Patreon-ize](https://www.patreon.com/bcurran3) the package maintainer.
___
summary: Tiny Portable Audio Converter for WAV MP3 FLAC OGG and APE
author: Danny Ben Shitrit
